LanguageData.DW_ReleaseWarpFire.label: Release warp fire
LanguageData.DW_ReleaseWarpFire.description: Channeling the power of the Immaterium into warp fire. It excels at controlling crowds of enemies.
LanguageData.DW_ReleaseWarpFire_Burst.label: Release warp fire(Burst)
LanguageData.DW_ReleaseWarpFire_Burst.description: Charge up the weapon and release holy flames onto the enemy.
LanguageData.DW_Voidstrike.label: Void strike
LanguageData.DW_Voidstrike.description: Sending out balls of Void energy that can both stagger and damage foes.
LanguageData.DW_Electrokinetic.label: Electrokinetic
LanguageData.DW_Electrokinetic.description: charge the staff and release lightning chain. The lightning will strike several enemies, even staggering bigger elites.
LanguageData.DW_VoidBlast.label: Void Blast
LanguageData.DW_VoidBlast.description: Charge up an attack, placing a field that will explode.
